scripts.dev: tsc -b tsconfig.packages.json --pretty false && install-electron --no && npm run dev --workspace @pige/desktop
scripts.build: tsc -b tsconfig.packages.json --pretty false --force && npm run build --workspace @pige/desktop
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b tsconfig.packages.json --pretty false && npm run typecheck --workspace @pige/desktop
scripts.package:dir:mac:arm64: npm run build && npm run prepare:package:mac:arm64 && npm run package:dir:mac:arm64 --workspace @pige/desktop
scripts.package:dir:win:x64: npm run build && npm run prepare:package:win:x64 && npm run package:dir:win:x64 --workspace @pige/desktop
scripts.release:package:mac:arm64: node scripts/release/run-release-builder.mjs --platform=macos --arch=arm64 --preflight-only=true && npm run build && npm run prepare:package:mac:arm64 && node scripts/release/run-release-builder.mjs --platform=macos --arch=arm64
scripts.release:package:win:x64: node scripts/release/run-release-builder.mjs --platform=windows --arch=x64 --preflight-only=true && npm run build && npm run prepare:package:win:x64 && node scripts/release/run-release-builder.mjs --platform=windows --arch=x64
scripts.verify: npm run verify:architecture-reset && npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions && npm run verify:ui-visual && npm run verify:independent-documentation-review && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts && npm run verify:dependencies && npm run verify:fixtures && npm run verify:boundaries && npm run verify:no-telemetry && npm run verify:source-artifacts && npm run verify:documentation-leanness && npm run verify:documentation-quality
scripts.verify:change: npm run verify:architecture-reset && npm run verify:whitespace
scripts.verify:docs: npm run verify:links && npm run verify:whitespace && npm run verify:doc-map && npm run verify:parser-manifests && npm run verify:prd-contract
scripts.verify:contracts: node scripts/verify/contract-stable-vocabulary.mjs && node scripts/verify/contract-job-recovery.mjs && node scripts/verify/contract-source-lifecycle.mjs && node scripts/verify/contract-security-egress.mjs && node scripts/verify/contract-consistency.mjs
scripts.verify:boundaries: node scripts/verify/import-boundaries.mjs && node scripts/verify/pi-runtime-boundary.mjs && node scripts/verify/pi-runtime-responsibility.mjs && node scripts/verify/pi-runtime-boundary-negative-cases.mjs && node scripts/verify/pi-import-side-effects.mjs
